perturbation.original_text: For all purposes of this Agreement, the Servicer shall be an independent contractor and shall not be subject to the supervision of the Owner with respect to the manner in which it accomplishes the performance of its obligations hereunder; provided, however, Servicer shall be subject to the Owner's third-party vendor management program. Unless expressly authorized by the Owner in this Agreement or otherwise, the Servicer shall have no authority to act for or represent the Owner in any way and shall not otherwise be deemed an agent of the Owner.
perturbation.changed_text: For all purposes of this Agreement, the Servicer shall be an independent contractor, but fully subject to the supervision of the Owner with respect to the manner in which it accomplishes the performance of its obligations hereunder; provided, however, Servicer shall be subject to the Owner's third-party vendor management program. Unless expressly authorized by the Owner in this Agreement or otherwise, the Servicer shall have no authority to act for or represent the Owner in any way and shall not otherwise be deemed an agent of the Owner.
perturbation.explanation: The changed text introduces a contradiction by stating the Servicer is an independent contractor, and immediately following stating it is fully subject to the supervision of the Owner. The original text explicitly states the Servicer 'shall not be subject to the supervision of the Owner' which is now directly contradicted.
perturbation.contradicted_text: For all purposes of this Agreement, the Servicer shall be an independent contractor, but fully subject to the supervision of the Owner with respect to the manner in which it accomplishes the performance of its obligations hereunder; provided, however, Servicer shall be subject to the Owner's third-party vendor management program. Unless expressly authorized by the Owner in this Agreement or otherwise, the Servicer shall have no authority to act for or represent the Owner in any way and shall not otherwise be deemed an agent of the Owner.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that the Servicer is 'fully subject to the supervision of the Owner' while simultaneously stating they are an 'independent contractor'. This creates a direct conflict because independent contractors, by definition, are not subject to such direct supervision in the manner of accomplishing their obligations. This directly contradicts the established understanding of an independent contractor relationship, creating a significant in-text contradiction. As the changed text and contradicted text are in the same location, they are in direct conflict.
